params.name: userkey
params.description: Personal API key issued by VesselFinder.

params.name: imo
params.description: Comma-separated list of IMO numbers. Either imo or mmsi is required.

params.name: mmsi
params.description: Comma-separated list of MMSI numbers. Either imo or mmsi is required.

params.name: format
params.description: Response format. Defaults to JSON.

params.name: extradata
params.description: Additional datasets to include in the response. Supported values are `voyage` and `master`.

params.name: interval
params.description: Maximum age of returned positions in minutes.

params.name: sat
params.description: Set to 1 to include satellite positions.

items.docs: Return AIS and optionally Voyage / Master data for one or more vessels identified by IMO or MMSI.

params.name: userkey
params.description: Personal API key issued by VesselFinder.

params.name: interval
params.description: Maximum age of returned events in minutes.

params.name: imo
params.description: Comma-separated list of IMO numbers. One of imo, mmsi, or locode is required.

params.name: mmsi
params.description: Comma-separated list of MMSI numbers. One of imo, mmsi, or locode is required.

params.name: locode
params.description: UN/LOCODE port identifier. Cannot be combined with imo or mmsi.

params.name: format
params.description: Response format. Defaults to JSON.

params.name: event
params.description: Filter to a single event type.

params.name: fromdate
params.description: Start of the date window (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS, UTC).

params.name: todate
params.description: End of the date window (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS, UTC).

params.name: extradata
params.description: Additional datasets to include. Supported values are `ais` and `voyage`.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of events to return.

params.name: last_id
params.description: Return only events with id greater than this value.

params.name: anchorage
params.description: 0 to exclude anchorage events, 1 to include, 2 to return anchorage events only.

params.name: imo_only
params.description: Restrict events to vessels carrying an IMO number.

items.docs: Return arrival and departure events for one or more vessels (by IMO or MMSI) or for a port (by LOCODE).

params.name: userkey
params.description: Personal API key issued by VesselFinder.

params.name: locode
params.description: UN/LOCODE port identifier.

params.name: interval
params.description: Look-ahead window in minutes from now. Use either interval or fromdate/todate.

params.name: format
params.description: Response format. Defaults to JSON.

params.name: aistype
params.description: Filter by AIS ship type code(s), comma separated.

items.docs: Return vessels with announced ETAs at the selected port within an interval or date window.

params.name: userkey
params.description: Personal API key issued by VesselFinder.

params.name: imo
params.description: Comma-separated list of IMO numbers.

params.name: format
params.description: Response format. Defaults to JSON.

items.docs: Return static vessel particulars (Master dataset) by IMO.

params.name: userkey
params.description: Personal API key issued by VesselFinder.

params.name: from
params.description: Origin as `lon,lat`.

params.name: to
params.description: Destination as `lon,lat`.

params.name: gateways
params.description: Comma-separated list of allowed gateways (suez, panama, kiel, oresund, messina, corinth, malacca, drake, magellan, northeast, northwest).

params.name: ECA
params.description: Emission Control Area preference.

params.name: EPSG3857
params.description: Set to 1 to return coordinates in WebMercator (EPSG:3857).

items.docs: Return the shortest sea route between two coordinates as a GeoJSON LineString together with distance in meters.

params.name: userkey
params.description: Personal API key issued by VesselFinder.

params.name: format
params.description: Response format. Defaults to JSON.

params.name: interval
params.description: Maximum position age in minutes.

items.docs: Return AIS, Voyage, and/or Master data for the account's predefined fleet (subscription).

params.name: userkey
params.description: Personal API key issued by VesselFinder.

params.name: format
params.description: Response format. Defaults to JSON.

params.name: interval
params.description: Maximum position age in minutes.

items.docs: Return all vessels in the account's predefined rectangular area (subscription).

params.name: userkey
params.description: Personal API key issued by VesselFinder.

params.name: format
params.description: Response format. Defaults to JSON.

items.docs: Return the remaining API credits and access expiration date for the account.

params.name: userkey
params.description: Personal API key issued by VesselFinder.

items.docs: Return the current list of vessels (IMO and MMSI) backing the VesselsList method.

params.name: userkey
params.description: Personal API key issued by VesselFinder.

items.docs: Add the supplied vessels (by IMO or MMSI) to the watchlist.

params.name: userkey
params.description: Personal API key issued by VesselFinder.

items.docs: Replace all vessels in the watchlist with the supplied list.

params.name: userkey
params.description: Personal API key issued by VesselFinder.

items.docs: Remove the supplied vessels from the watchlist.
